title: Claude Design Basics | Master 95% in 10 Minutes
summary: Tristen O'Brien presents a 6-step framework for using Claude Design, Anthropic's new design tool. The video demonstrates building landing pages, pitch decks, and mobile app prototypes from text prompts without coding or design experience, covering interface basics through export and handoff to Claude Code.
